title: Crypto's Next Frontier Isn't Crypto, It's Financing AI and Robotics, Framework's Anderson Says
summary: Blockchain is becoming the financial layer for capital-intensive industries like AI and robotics rather than just crypto-native speculation, according to Michael Anderson, co-founder of Framework Ventures.
body:
Michael Anderson, co-founder of crypto venture firm Framework Ventures, says blockchain is becoming the financial layer for capital-intensive industries such as AI and robotics, rather than being limited to crypto-native speculation.

Anderson's perspective highlights a shift in how blockchain technology is being applied: moving beyond its original use case of powering decentralized cryptocurrencies to serving as a more efficient and transparent funding mechanism for sectors that require substantial capital.

This trend suggests that blockchain-based financial instruments could lower barriers to entry for startups and innovators in AI and robotics, field that are experiencing rapid growth. For everyday people, this could mean that blockchain technology will play a crucial role in advancing technologies that affect daily life, from healthcare to transportation.

As more industries adopt blockchain, a broader range of applications and investment opportunities are expected to emerge, underscoring the versatility of the technology beyond its original scope.
twitterThread: Blockchain is becoming the financial layer for capital-intensive industries like AI and robotics, not just crypto-native speculation, says Framework Ventures' Michael Anderson. Here’s what that means.
Anderson highlights that blockchain can provide more efficient and transparent funding for sectors that need large-scale capital, moving beyond crypto's original use case.

This shift could open up new investment opportunities and accelerate innovation in AI and robotics. Stay tuned. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-28-cryptos-next-frontier-financing-ai-and-robotics-says-frameworks-anderson
standaloneTweet: Blockchain is becoming the financial layer for AI and robotics, not just crypto speculation, says Framework Ventures' Michael Anderson. This shift could accelerate innovation in capital-intensive industries.
